form.formComment: Returns from a six months spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (19.90) over 336m at Muswellbrook. Has started fresh up three times for a win and a placing. Capable of playing a role in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when second (17.05) at this track, making it two placings on end. Drawn close to the inside. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Scored (17.03) last time out at this track in a Grade 5 and will break from box 3 for the first time. Makes strong appeal on best.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by a nose at this track (17.00) beating Grandpa Joe in a Grade 5 on March 24. Happy enough to dismiss in this field.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hit the running rail, on the home turn.
Approaching the finishing post eased and turned head.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (17.25) over 300m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Others preferred.
